title: Robust Springy Italian Freekeh Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful one-pot Italian dish featuring freekeh, perfect for a springtime meal. This vegetarian-friendly pilaf is made with fresh ingredients and a burst of citrus flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the freekeh and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
While the freekeh is cooking, blanch the asparagus in boiling water for 3 minutes, then shock in an ice bath.
Add the blanched asparagus, cherry tomatoes, and lemon juice to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and top with grated parmesan cheese and chopped parsley.
